role: Director of IPIS (Institute for Political and International Studies)
bio: Mostafa Zahrani served as head of the [Institute for Political and International Studies (IPIS)](/orgs/ipis), the [Ministry of Foreign Affairs](/orgs/ministry-of-foreign-affairs)' in-house think tank. He oversaw the [Iran Experts Initiative](/events/iei-email-leak-2023), serving as the main liaison between the network of Western-based academics and [Mohammad Javad Zarif](/people/javad-zarif)'s Foreign Ministry. Leaked emails showed that IEI members such as [Ali Vaez](/people/ali-vaez) shared article drafts with Zahrani before publication, and that [Ariane Tabatabai](/people/ariane-tabatabai) consulted him on conference attendance and engagements with Israeli and Saudi counterparts.
editorial_notes: IPIS head during IEI period. Replaced by Khatibzadeh in Jan 2025.
